subcodes.first_line: Someone wants to know the secret of what was revealed to him that came before me regarding the sun and his standing while facing it.
subcodes.first_line_orig: و الذی اراد ان یعرف سر ما ظهر من ظهور قبلی فی الشمس و قیامه تلقائها طوبی لمن سئل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
